Video Title: How to sign up
Description: Create your account using email or phone.

Video Title: How to verify your email and phone
Description: Complete OTP verification to activate your account.

Video Title: How to complete your profile
Description: Fill in name / photo / date of birth / address.

Video Title: How to navigate your dashboard
Description: Tour the home screen: courses / live classes / streak / XP.

Video Title: How to install the learner mobile app
Navigation Flow: App Store / Play Store > Search Vacademy > Install
Description: Get the iOS / Android app on your phone.

Video Title: How to set notification preferences for the first time
Description: Pick which alerts you want from the platform.

Video Title: How to switch the app language
Description: Use the app in your preferred language.

Video Title: How to access your courses
Description: Open the list of courses you are enrolled in.

Video Title: How to start a chapter
Description: Begin a chapter and view its slides.

Video Title: How to mark a slide complete
Description: Track progress slide by slide.

Video Title: How to download course PDFs and notes
Description: Save reading material for offline access.

Video Title: How to enable offline access on mobile
Description: Pre-download chapters for offline study.

Video Title: How to track your overall course progress
Description: See completion percentage and what to do next.

Video Title: How to bookmark a slide
Description: Save important slides for quick access later.

Video Title: How to use the streak counter and XP
Description: Maintain a daily streak and earn XP for completing chapters.

Video Title: How to view your achievements / badges
Description: Track milestones you have unlocked.

Video Title: How to view course faculty / instructors
Description: See who teaches your course.

Video Title: How to view course announcements
Description: Read latest updates from your instructor.

Video Title: How to view scheduled live sessions
Description: See your calendar of live classes.

Video Title: How to join a live session
Description: Enter a live class at the scheduled time.

Video Title: How to access session recordings
Navigation Flow: Learner App > Live Sessions > Past > [Session] > Watch
Description: Re-watch a recorded class.

Video Title: How to view your attendance
Description: Check your attendance percentage per session.

Video Title: How to book a session slot
Navigation Flow: Learner App > Live Sessions > Book Slot
Description: Reserve a slot for office hours / 1:1 sessions.

Video Title: How to take an assessment
Description: Begin a timed assessment.

Video Title: How to view your assessment scores
Description: See your total score and pass / fail status.

Video Title: How to view the marks breakdown
Description: See marks per question and per section.

Video Title: How to view your response analysis
Description: Compare your answers vs the correct ones.

Video Title: How to request re-evaluation
Description: Ask an instructor to re-check your grading.

Video Title: How to attempt a practice test
Description: Take a no-stakes practice attempt.

Video Title: How to attempt a mock test
Description: Simulate the real assessment under timed conditions.

Video Title: How to view your overall test history
Description: See all past attempts in one place.

Video Title: How to attempt a coding question
Navigation Flow: Learner App > Courses > [Coding Slide] > Run Code
Description: Write code in the in-app editor and run it against test cases.

Video Title: How to view your coding submission history
Description: See past attempts and pass / fail results.

Video Title: How to ask a doubt on a chapter
Navigation Flow: Learner App > Courses > [Chapter] > Ask a Doubt
Description: Submit a question to your instructor.

Video Title: How to view replies to your doubts
Description: Check instructor responses.

Video Title: How to attach an image or PDF to a doubt
Description: Include a photo of your work with your question.

Video Title: How to chat with the AI tutor
Description: Get instant AI-powered answers to your questions.

Video Title: How to view your doubt history
Description: See all your past doubts and resolutions.

Video Title: How to view your invoices
Description: See all your invoices in one place.

Video Title: How to make a fee payment
Description: Pay an invoice using UPI / card / netbanking.

Video Title: How to use a coupon code at checkout
Navigation Flow: Learner App > My Payments > Checkout > Apply Coupon
Description: Apply a discount before paying.

Video Title: How to view your payment history
Description: See all completed and pending payments.

Video Title: How to download a payment receipt
Navigation Flow: Learner App > My Payments > [Invoice] > Download Receipt
Description: Get a printable receipt.

Video Title: How to view upcoming installments
Description: See what's due next and when.

Video Title: How to set up auto-pay for installments
Description: Schedule automatic payment of installments.

Video Title: How to update your profile
Description: Change your name / photo / details.

Video Title: How to upload a profile picture
Description: Add a profile photo.

Video Title: How to change your password
Navigation Flow: Learner App > Profile > Security > Change Password
Description: Update your account password.

Video Title: How to enable two-factor authentication
Description: Add an extra security step at login.

Video Title: How to manage notification preferences
Description: Pick which alerts you want to receive.

Video Title: How to enable privacy screen on mobile
Navigation Flow: Learner App > Profile > Privacy > Privacy Screen
Description: Block screenshots and screen recording.

Video Title: How to view your parent / guardian details
Description: Manage parent / guardian contact info.

Video Title: How to add additional contact info
Description: Add backup phone / email.

Video Title: How to view your notifications
Description: See system / course / payment / message alerts.

Video Title: How to mark notifications as read
Description: Clear out the unread queue.

Video Title: How to filter notifications by type
Description: Show only payment / message / class alerts.

Video Title: How to access your files
Description: Open files shared by your institute or saved by you.

Video Title: How to organize your files into folders
Description: Create folders to keep materials tidy.

Video Title: How to download a shared file
Description: Save a shared file to your device.

Video Title: How to view your performance report
Description: See progress / scores / attendance over time.

Video Title: How to share a report with your parent
Description: Send a snapshot to a parent or guardian.

Video Title: How to view subject-wise insights
Description: Drill into how you are doing in each subject.

Video Title: How to view your test rank in the cohort
Description: Compare your performance with peers anonymously.

Video Title: How to view your active membership
Description: See your subscription plan and renewal date.

Video Title: How to renew or upgrade your plan
Description: Move to a higher tier or extend your current plan.

Video Title: How to cancel your subscription
Description: End your active subscription.

Video Title: How to download your certificate
Description: Save and share your completion certificates.

Video Title: How to share a certificate to LinkedIn
Description: Post your achievement on LinkedIn.

Video Title: How to join a discussion thread
Description: Participate in cohort discussions.

Video Title: How to follow other learners
Description: Build a learning network inside your cohort.

Video Title: How to ask a question in the community
Description: Post a question to peers.

Video Title: How to update the app over the air
Navigation Flow: Learner App > Settings > About > Check for Updates
Description: Pull the latest version without going to the store.

Video Title: How to enable dark mode
Navigation Flow: Learner App > Profile > Appearance > Dark Mode
Description: Switch to dark theme.

Video Title: How to clear app cache
Navigation Flow: Learner App > Settings > Storage > Clear Cache
Description: Free up space on your device.

Video Title: How to submit feedback / report a bug
Description: Send feedback or report issues.

Video Title: How to contact your institute
Description: Reach your institute admin team for support.

Video Title: How to view FAQs
Description: Browse the help center for common questions.
